name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV400 protection sunglasses with polarized lenses. Lightweight frame perfect for beach outings, hiking, and daily summer wear. Blocks 100% of harmful UVA and UVB rays.

name: Floral Printed Swimsuit
description: Vibrant floral printed one-piece swimsuit with adjustable straps and a flattering cut. Made from quick-dry chlorine-resistant fabric. Ideal for pool parties and beach vacations.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Lotion
description: Broad spectrum SPF 50 sunscreen lotion that provides all-day protection against UVA and UVB rays. Water-resistant for up to 80 minutes. Lightweight, non-greasy formula suitable for all skin types.

name: Beach Tote Bag
description: Spacious waterproof beach tote bag with multiple inner pockets and a secure zipper. Holds towels, sunscreen, snacks, and more. Woven design with reinforced handles for heavy loads.

name: Men's Linen Shorts
description: Lightweight breathable linen shorts for men, perfect for hot summer days. Features an elastic waistband, two side pockets, and a relaxed fit. Available in multiple earthy tones.

name: Inflatable Pool Float
description: Giant inflatable flamingo pool float made from durable PVC. Holds up to 220 lbs and inflates quickly. Perfect for pool parties, lake days, and backyard fun. Bright pink with glossy finish.

name: Cooling Face Mist Spray
description: Refreshing hydrating face mist with aloe vera, rose water, and cucumber extract. Provides an instant cooling effect on hot summer days. Travel-friendly 100ml bottle, great for on-the-go hydration.

name: Straw Sun Hat
description: Wide-brim natural straw sun hat with a ribbon bow detail. Offers excellent sun protection for the face and neck. Foldable and packable — fits easily in your beach bag. Perfect for garden parties and vacations.

name: Women's Flowy Sundress
description: Elegant flowy sundress with a tropical print, adjustable spaghetti straps, and a tiered hem. Made from soft chiffon fabric that moves beautifully in summer breeze. Suitable for beach, brunch, or casual outings.

name: Waterproof Sandals
description: Durable waterproof sport sandals with adjustable straps, arch support, and non-slip rubber outsole. Designed for beach walks, water activities, and outdoor adventures. Available in unisex sizing.

name: Portable Beach Umbrella
description: Heavy-duty 7ft beach umbrella with UV50+ protection and a tilt mechanism for flexible sun blocking. Features a sand anchor base for stability in windy conditions. Comes with a carrying bag.
